subject: Shroomish, the Mushroom Pokemon — Hoenn Grass-type small round mushroom creature with spotted cap
description: A small round creature with a mushroom cap covering its upper body stands in a simple pose. The figure has a pale round lower body and a domed brownish cap with darker spots on top. Small stubby limbs are barely visible at the sides. The background is a warm gradient of orange and yellow tones suggesting a forest floor or warm ambient light. The creature's expression appears neutral to slightly grumpy. The card style is clean Ken Sugimori official artwork.
foreground: small round mushroom creature with spotted cap and stubby limbs
background: warm orange-yellow gradient, forest floor suggestion
